# atlassian_jira_issue_type_screen_scheme (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud issue type screen scheme by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_issue_type_screen_scheme" "example" {
  name = "Default Issue Type Screen Scheme"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the issue type screen scheme to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the issue type screen scheme.
- `id` (String) The ID of the issue type screen scheme.
